items.name: Sword Of The Storm
items.description: Forged in the heart of an eternal tempest, this blade crackles with caged lightning. Each swing splits the air with thunderclaps that shatter the resolve of armies.

items.name: Hellfire Blade
items.description: Quenched in demon blood and sealed with infernal runes, this sword burns with an unquenchable flame that feeds on the souls of the fallen.

items.name: Commander Sword
items.description: Carried by the last general of the Grudge Crusade, this blade inspires unwavering loyalty in allies and dread in foes. Its edge has never dulled.

items.name: Emerald Sword
items.description: Cut from a single world-crystal found in the roots of the Fabled Tree, this blade pulses with the heartbeat of the forest itself.

items.name: Runed Great Sword
items.description: Ancient runes carved by the first Grudge wardens pulse with power. Each kill adds a new rune, and the sword grows hungrier.

items.name: Demons Shard
items.description: A fragment of a shattered demon lord's spine, reforged into a blade that whispers dark promises. It feeds on fear and grows stronger in darkness.

items.name: Shrouded Axe
items.description: Wrapped in shadows that cling like living smoke, this axe was the weapon of the Legion's ghost executioner. Its victims never see it coming.

items.name: Thors Hammer
items.description: Not the god's own, but a hammer forged from the same celestial ore, struck by a thousand thunderbolts during its creation. Only the worthy can lift it.

items.name: Steel Maul
items.description: Pure dwarven steel, no enchantments, no magic — just perfect engineering and devastating weight. The dwarves say it speaks for itself.

items.name: War Hammer
items.description: Blessed by the last priest of the Crusade before the fall, this hammer glows with divine radiance and burns the undead on contact.

items.name: Spear Of Destiny
items.description: Legend says whoever wields this spear controls the fate of nations. It has pierced the hearts of kings and toppled empires.

items.name: Royal Spear
items.description: The ceremonial weapon of the Grudge royal guard, each gem in its shaft represents a kingdom sworn to the Grudge throne.

items.name: Light Spear
items.description: Woven from crystallized starlight by the Fabled elves, this spear weighs nothing and strikes with the brilliance of a falling star.

items.name: Frost Blade
items.description: Carved from glacier ice that never melts, this blade freezes the blood of those it cuts. The cold it radiates can be felt from ten paces.

items.name: Staff Of The Magi
items.description: The pinnacle of arcane craftsmanship, wielded by the archmage who shattered the first Grudge seal. It amplifies magic beyond mortal limits.

items.name: Staff Of The Dead
items.description: Fashioned from the spine of a lich king, this staff bridges the gap between life and death. The spirits of the slain answer its call.

items.name: Staff Of Power
items.description: Raw magical energy given form. This staff doesn't channel spells — it IS a spell, barely contained, vibrating with unimaginable power.

items.name: Tomb Of The Magi
items.description: A living grimoire that writes itself. Pages appear and vanish as needed, containing every spell ever conceived and some that have yet to be imagined.

items.name: WindWalker Bow
items.description: Strung with wind itself, arrows fired from this bow bend around obstacles and strike true. The wind carries the archer's will.

items.name: Spiked Club
items.description: Crude but devastatingly effective. Torn from the hands of an orc warchief after a three-day duel, every spike is stained with the blood of champions.

items.name: Crude Shortsword
items.description: A dull blade barely fit for combat. Every warrior starts somewhere.

items.name: Crude Hatchet
items.description: A worn hatchet with a chipped edge.

items.name: Crude Dagger
items.description: A rusty shiv found in the wreckage.

items.name: Crude Greatsword
items.description: A heavy blade that's seen better days.

items.name: Crude Greataxe
items.description: A massive axe covered in rust.

items.name: Crude Hammer
items.description: A blacksmith's reject.

items.name: Crude Maul
items.description: Too heavy to swing well but it hurts.

items.name: Crude Spear
items.description: A sharpened stick with pretensions.

items.name: Crude Shortbow
items.description: Barely holds the string.

items.name: Crude Crossbow
items.description: A creaking contraption that mostly works.

items.name: Crude Pistol
items.description: One shot wonder. Pray it doesn't jam.

items.name: Crude Fire Staff
items.description: A charred branch that still sparks.

items.name: Crude Frost Staff
items.description: Cold to the touch even in summer.

items.name: Crude Holy Staff
items.description: Faintly glows when no one is looking.

items.name: Crude Nature Staff
items.description: Wrapped in dead vines.

items.name: Crude Lightning Staff
items.description: Shocks the wielder as often as the enemy.

items.name: Crude Shield
items.description: A battered plank with a handle nailed on.

items.name: Crude Tool
items.description: A multi-purpose tool. Barely.

items.name: Tattered Tome
items.description: Pages are mostly illegible.

items.name: Crude Cloth Helm
items.description: A threadbare hood.

items.name: Crude Cloth Chest
items.description: More holes than fabric.

items.name: Crude Cloth Hands
items.description: Barely qualifies as gloves.

items.name: Crude Cloth Feet
items.description: Wrapped rags for feet.

items.name: Crude Cloth Shoulders
items.description: Pads made from old sacks.

items.name: Miner's Forge
items.description: A basic smelting forge for processing ore into ingots.

items.name: Forester's Workbench
items.description: A sturdy bench for processing timber and leather.

items.name: Mystic Altar
items.description: An arcane altar for enchanting and essence extraction.

items.name: Chef's Hearth
items.description: A cooking fire with iron grates for preparing food.

items.name: Engineer's Workshop
items.description: A complex workstation for assembling devices and consumables.

items.name: Pirate Claim Flag
items.description: Plant this flag to claim territory for your crew. Establishes a base.

items.name: Storage Chest
items.description: A locked chest for storing items. 20 slot capacity.

items.name: Reinforced Vault
items.description: A fortified vault with 60 slot capacity. Harder to break into.

items.name: Campfire
items.description: A simple campfire for resting and cooking basic food. Provides warmth buff.

items.name: Repair Anvil
items.description: Repair damaged equipment. Consumes materials based on item tier.

items.name: Dye Station
items.description: Change equipment colors using pigments and essences.

items.name: Ship Repair Dock
items.description: Repair ship hull and sails. Required for sea travel maintenance.

items.name: Advanced Forge
items.description: An upgraded forge for T5+ crafting. Smelts rare alloys.

items.name: Arcane Sanctum
items.description: A powerful altar for T5+ enchanting and legendary essence work.

items.name: Grand Kitchen
items.description: A fully equipped kitchen for T5+ feast preparation.

items.name: Warhorse
items.description: A sturdy warhorse bred in the Western Kingdoms.

items.name: Dire Wolf
items.description: A massive wolf tamed by Orc beast masters.

items.name: Moonlit Stag
items.description: A graceful stag that moves silently through forests.

items.name: Ironback Boar
items.description: A thick-skinned boar that can charge through enemies.

items.name: Skeletal Charger
items.description: A reanimated warhorse bound by dark magic.

items.name: Painted Stallion
items.description: A wild stallion decorated with war paint.

items.name: Merchant's Donkey
items.description: A slow but reliable pack animal. +20 inventory slots while mounted.

items.name: Pirate's Rowboat
items.description: A small coastal rowboat. Allows shallow water travel.
